title: Bee Removal in Kensington, Brooklyn | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Kensington, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $350-$550.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Kensington, Brooklyn, protecting homes and businesses from unwanted hives and swarms. Our licensed technicians safely remove bees from residential properties, apartment buildings, and commercial spaces while prioritizing the safety of your family, pets, and the environment. With transparent pricing from $350 to $550, we deliver fast, humane bee extraction services to the Kensington community.
whyUs: Our team has extensive experience handling bee infestations in Kensington's diverse mix of multi-family homes, pre-war buildings, and local businesses. We use safe, eco-friendly methods and offer same-day emergency service to quickly resolve bee problems before they escalate.
localContext: Kensington's tree-lined streets, proximity to Prospect Park, and abundance of older brick homes and apartment buildings create ideal conditions for bee colonies to establish nests in wall voids, attics, and eaves. The neighborhood's gardens and the nearby Parade Grounds attract pollinators, making professional bee removal services essential for maintaining safe outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Kensington typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive location, size, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Kensington property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Kensington. Most bee removals are completed within 1-3 hours, though larger colonies or hard-to-reach locations may require additional time.

faqs.question: Is bee removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bee removal methods prioritize safety for all occupants. We use protective equipment and proven techniques to remove bees without harmful chemicals whenever possible, and we provide clear safety instructions throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve beneficial bee populations. However, if relocation isn't feasible due to location or safety concerns, we use targeted treatments that minimize environmental impact while protecting your property.
